page.title: App Integrations
page.description: Here's a list of your apps for the integration!

telegram.description: Connect with Telegram for real-time communication.

notion.description: Effortlessly sync Notion pages for seamless collaboration.

figma.description: View and collaborate on Figma designs in one place.

trello.description: Sync Trello cards for streamlined project management.

slack.description: Integrate Slack for efficient team communication.

zoom.description: Host Zoom meetings directly from the dashboard.

stripe.description: Easily manage Stripe transactions and payments.

gmail.description: Access and manage Gmail messages effortlessly.

medium.description: Explore and share Medium stories on your dashboard.

docker.description: Effortlessly manage Docker containers on your dashboard.

github.description: Streamline code management with GitHub integration.

gitlab.description: Efficiently manage code projects with GitLab integration.

discord.description: Connect with Discord for seamless team communication.

whatsapp.description: Easily integrate WhatsApp for direct messaging.
